---
title: "Activities"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

<div style="margin-left: 0;">
  <span style="color: #f96211;"><strong>Jan 2025 - Jun 2025 Teaching Assistant</strong></span>
</div>

Course: Statistical Analysis for Public Policy and Management (Instructor: Yanto Chandra) 

Main Tasks: Give a guest lecture on the survey experiment; Assess students’ assignments
